Scratch — 5 boats, 3 races, penalty result codes (DNC, DNF, OCS)

RRS A5.3: A boat that did not start, did not finish, retired, or was disqualified shall be scored points equal to the number of boats entitled to race plus one (N+1). With 5 entered boats, N+1 = 6. A boat absent from a race (no finish record) is scored DNC = N+1.

Scoring configuration: No discards. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

All 5 boats finish cleanly
    David gets OCS (on course side at start), Eve DNF (retired mid-race)
    Alice, Bob, Carol finish normally
    Carol has an explicit DNC (decided not to race)
    Eve is absent (no finish record) — treated as implicit DNC, same score as explicit DNC
      Eve ("505") has no entry at all — implicit DNC
Points summary (N+1 = 6 for all penalty codes):
  Alice:  1 + 1 + 1 = 3
  Bob:    2 + 2 + 2 = 6
  Carol:  3 + 3 + 6 = 12   (DNC in race 3)
  David:  4 + 6 + 3 = 13   (OCS in race 2)
  Eve:    5 + 6 + 6 = 17   (DNF in race 2, implicit DNC in race 3)
Rank Sail Helm R1 R2 R3 Total
1st 101 Alice 1 1 1 3
2nd 202 Bob 2 2 2 6
3rd 303 Carol 3 3 6 DNC 12
4th 404 David 4 6 OCS 3 13
5th 505 Eve 5 6 DNF 6 DNC 17
